scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All pass criteria met: sequential calls (fraud before gateway), AC6 tested with explicit gateway.charge-not-called assertion, AC4/AC5 chain original error via cause field verified by reference equality, AC3 preserves decline reason as error message, all 6 ACs mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage with corresponding tests, 12 tests using mock services.

observations.text: Call ordering verified with push-array technique, not just mock call counts — stronger than minimum requirement
AC2+AC6 tested together in same describe block, explicitly verifying gateway.charge not called on fraud detection
Error chaining uses reference equality (cause===originalError) in tests, confirming true chain not just message copying
AC3 includes fallback test for missing declineReason — goes beyond minimum spec
AC4 also verifies gateway.charge not called on fraud service network error — additional no-side-effect coverage
Non-null assertion on transactionId when success=true is a minor code smell, though acknowledged in low_confidence_areas
